prompt: Sprite sheet for a children's game: 2x3 grid (2 rows, 3 columns), PURE WHITE #FFFFFF background, wide white margins between cells, nothing touching cell edges or grid lines. The EXACT SAME cartoon character in all 6 cells: a cute little girl pastry chef, brown bob hair, big white chef hat, white long-sleeved chef jacket, pink apron, dark gray pants, brown shoes, cute soft 3D-render storybook style like a Pixar movie, SAME body size, SAME head size, SAME camera angle (side view facing RIGHT) and SAME lighting in every cell, feet on the same ground baseline. The 6 poses: (1) standing still, hands together in front, gentle smile; (2) WALK CONTACT POSE: full wide stride, front leg stretched far forward, back leg stretched far behind with heel lifted, arms swinging in opposite directions, body leaning slightly forward, lively and bouncy like a cartoon walk cycle; (3) WALK PASSING POSE: legs almost together, one knee slightly raised crossing past the other leg, body upright, arms at mid-swing; (4) jumping with joy, both arms up, knees bent; (5) waving hello with one arm raised high; (6) celebrating happily with a big smile and open arms. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: any text, letters or numbers anywhere.
